title: lespedeza × longifolia
intro: Lespedeza × longifolia, also known as a hybrid of Lespedeza species, is a plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to parts of Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. Lespedeza × longifolia has been traditionally used to support kidney and urinary health, as well as to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal properties.
